title: Tree-Based Models Path
description: Build fluency in Tree-Based Models inside Optimization Algorithms by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: particle filter
steps.summary: particle filter belongs to the Optimization Algorithms area of AI/ML, within Tree-Based Models. It sits inside Optimization Algorithms / Tree-Based Models. Start after Filter Method. It opens into Rao-Blackwellized Particle Filter and Bootstrap Particle Filter.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: DeepGBM (NN + GBM Hybrid)
steps.summary: DeepGBM (NN + GBM Hybrid) belongs to the Optimization Algorithms area of AI/ML, within Tree-Based Models. It sits inside Optimization Algorithms / Tree-Based Models. Start after R(2+1)D and Hybrid Models.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Rao-Blackwellized Particle Filter
steps.summary: Rao-Blackwellized Particle Filter belongs to the Optimization Algorithms area of AI/ML, within Tree-Based Models. It sits inside Optimization Algorithms / Tree-Based Models. Start after particle filter and Filter Method.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: normalized discounted cumulative gain (nDCG)
steps.summary: normalized discounted cumulative gain (nDCG) belongs to the Optimization Algorithms area of AI/ML, within Tree-Based Models. It sits inside Optimization Algorithms / Tree-Based Models. Start after Cumulative Gain.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Cramér-Rao Bound
steps.summary: Cramér-Rao Bound belongs to the Optimization Algorithms area of AI/ML, within Tree-Based Models. It sits inside Optimization Algorithms / Tree-Based Models. Compare it with Rao-Blackwellized Particle Filter and particle filter. It opens into Cramér-Rao Lower Bound.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: KTO-pairwise
steps.summary: KTO-pairwise belongs to the Optimization Algorithms area of AI/ML, within Tree-Based Models. It sits inside Optimization Algorithms / Tree-Based Models. Compare it with particle filter and Cramér-Rao Bound.
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.
